# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Twilio\Rest\Client;

class SmsService
{
    private $accountSid;
    private $authToken;
    private $fromNumber;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = Config::get('twilio.account_sid');
        $this->authToken = Config::get('twilio.auth_token');
        $this->fromNumber = Config::get('twilio.from_number');
    }

    public function sendSms($to, $message)
    {
        try {
            $client = new Client($this->accountSid, $this->authToken);
            $client->messages
                ->create($this->fromNumber, [
                    'body' => $message,
                    'messaging_service_sid' => Config::get('twilio.messaging_service_sid'),
                    'to' => $to
                ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            // Handle Twilio API errors here
        }
    }
}
